name: Fried Vegetarian Spring Rolls (Cha Gio Chay)
recipeIngredient: Water chestnuts or 1/2 small jicama, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Vegetable Platter, noodles, and dipping sauces.
2. Set aside.
3. Soak noodles in warm water for 30 minutes; drain.
4. Cut noodles into 1/2-inch lengths.
5. Remove stems from mushrooms; squeeze out soaking liquid.
6. Mince all mushrooms.
7. In a mixing bowl, combine filling ingredients and blend well.
8. Assemble the rolls:
- Dissolve sugar in warm water.
- Keep remaining rice papers covered with a damp cloth.
- Dip one sheet at a time into sweetened warm water.
- Lay flat on a dry towel without letting them touch.
9. Fold over bottom third of each round and add filling.
10. Press filling into a compact rectangle.
11. Fold sides over the mixture, then roll from bottom to top.
12. Repeat until all filling is used.
13. Fry the rolls:
- Heat oil in skillets to 325F.
- Add rolls without letting them touch; fry for 10-12 minutes, turning often.
14. Drain on paper towels and keep warm in a low oven until cooked.
15. Serve with lettuce leaves, noodles, and dipping sauces.
Yield: 40 rolls
